title: Hive (disambiguation)
content:
'''Hives''' may refer to:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Cog Hive Seven]]'''
*'''[[Geonosian hive/Legends|Geonosian hives]]'''
*'''[[Green hives]]'''
*'''[[Hive rat]]
*'''[[Hive Ronin]]
*'''[[Hive virus]]'''

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
'''''[[The Hive]]''''' is the title of an [[eBook]] by [[Steven Barnes]] that supplements ''[[The Cestus Deception]]''. It refers to a hive of the [[X'Ting]].
